loading.description: Loading spinner message while fetching book list

noBooksYet.description: Empty state message when the filtered book list is empty

statusTab.all.description: Filter tab label showing all books regardless of status

statusTab.wishlisted.description: Filter tab label for wishlisted books

statusTab.purchased.description: Filter tab label for purchased books

statusTab.reading.description: Filter tab label for books currently being read

statusTab.read.description: Filter tab label for finished books

status.wishlisted.description: Display badge label for wishlisted status

status.purchased.description: Display badge label for purchased status

status.reading.description: Display badge label for currently reading status

status.read.description: Display badge label for finished/read status

filterBy.description: Accessibility label for filter tab buttons, e.g. 'Filter by Reading'

bookCardA11y.description: Accessibility label for a book card row, combining title and status

bookCardHint.description: Accessibility hint for a book card — tells the user what tapping does

markAs.description: Button label to advance a book to the next reading status, e.g. 'Mark as Reading'

markAsA11y.description: Accessibility label for the mark-as button

removeFromList.description: Button label to remove a book from the user's list

removeBookA11y.description: Accessibility label for the remove button, includes book title

closeDetail.description: Accessibility label for the close button on the book detail sheet

errorLoadBooks.description: Error message when the book list fails to load

errorUpdateStatus.description: Error message when updating book status fails

errorRemoveBook.description: Error message when removing a book fails

searchPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text inside the library search bar

searchA11y.description: Accessibility label for the library search input

sectionTitle.description: Heading above the book grid — 'My Library'

bookCount.description: Subtitle below the section heading showing total volume count, e.g. '48 volumes in your collection.'
